title: Student Affairs
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU’s global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU's campus in New York City.
text:
Student Affairs
The office of Student Affairs at NYU Shanghai provides a wide range of resources, activities, and guidelines to help our students live up to the NYU motto of “in and of the city.”
New Student Programs help first-year and study away students find their bearing in our community, and Residential Education and Housing will get you situated in your home away from home. NYU Shanghai also facilitates an array of student activities, community engagement initiatives, athletics, diversity initiatives, career development and health and wellness resources.
It is our sincere wish that you will make the most of these resources during your time here, and contribute to our community in lasting ways.
New Student Programs
Want to get oriented and begin your life in Shanghai? Start here.
Residential Education & Housing
Find out about available housing options at NYU Shanghai.
Athletics & Fitness
Love sports? Get moving! Team athletics are on the rise at NYU Shanghai.
Activities & Community Engagement
Join a student club or organization, participate in student government, or volunteer for a service project.
Career Development
Get comprehensive career guidance at the CCD.
Community Standards
These standards of conduct help ensure that our community is a safe, respectful, and supportive environment.
Campus Safety
Access resources that help keep you safe on campus.
Center for Student Belonging
Support diversity by participating in initiatives like Intersections and Ally Week.
Health & Wellness
Access an array of professional services tailored to support your physical, emotional, and mental health needs at NYU Shanghai.
Visa Support
